message:
fix: resolve dead_code and unused_variable warnings for CI

- prefix unused `model` parameter with underscore in pricing.rs
- add #[expect(dead_code)] for format_prompt in prompt.rs
- add #[expect(dead_code)] for ClaudeStatsCache, CodexEvent, CostScanner.paths in cost_scanner.rs
- add #[expect(dead_code)] for jwt_checker field and fix unnested_or_patterns in credential_health.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ impl ModelPricing {
     /// Create a new pricing entry.
     #[must_use]
     pub const fn new(
-        model: &'static str,
+        _model: &'static str,
         input_per_million: f64,
         output_per_million: f64,
         cache_read_per_million: f64,
